title: Siren Head: Java Edition
description: Adds a modern legend to Minecraft!
body:
**To the people that keep taking our model, can you please credit us, it's stressing and demotivating us to see our stuff get taken without proper credit, thank you for your understanding!**

Are you ready to start your horror adventure with Siren Head? Then you are in the right place!


Since this is my first mod you can judge it how you want, but I will appreciate some constructive criticisms to help me to get better.

Join my [Discord](https://discord.gg/NeADkQfR4b) for little spoilers and more infos!
If you want to support me join my [Patreon](https://www.patreon.com/thepigeondev/posts)!

New version out now!

## Our models/assets are NOT publicy available, please ask before using them (and maybe read the licence)
